records.m_Talk_ENG:
Whoa
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Whoa
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Whoa
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: How the heck is there a place like this inside a cave? The lights even work!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How the heck is there a place like this inside a cave? The lights even work!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How the heck is there a place like this inside a cave? The lights even work!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like the C.O. was drawn in by whatever power source was keeping this facility running.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like the C.O. was drawn in by whatever power source was keeping this facility running.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like the C.O. was drawn in by whatever power source was keeping this facility running.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's an Eternium Drive. It's the core unit that every dimensional ship from the Administration has.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's an Eternium Drive. It's the core unit that every dimensional ship from the Administration has.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's an Eternium Drive. It's the core unit that every dimensional ship from the Administration has.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A dimensional ship?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A dimensional ship?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A dimensional ship?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How does something that huge end up in a cave? If it crashed, wouldn't there be a massive crater in the mountain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How does something that huge end up in a cave? If it crashed, wouldn't there be a massive crater in the mountain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How does something that huge end up in a cave? If it crashed, wouldn't there be a massive crater in the mountain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unless it didn't fall. Maybe it rose from underground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unless it didn't fall. Maybe it rose from underground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unless it didn't fall. Maybe it rose from underground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are called dimensional ships for a reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are called dimensional ships for a reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are called dimensional ships for a reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some of the ship's energy is being routed elsewhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some of the ship's energy is being routed elsewhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some of the ship's energy is being routed elsewhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we follow the flow of energy, we might uncover more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we follow the flow of energy, we might uncover more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we follow the flow of energy, we might uncover more.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, are we talking hidden passageways now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, are we talking hidden passageways now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, are we talking hidden passageways now?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
This feels like one of those mystery adventures
8v. But don't you think we'll get in trouble with the Administration if we poke around too much?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
This feels like one of those mystery adventures
8v. But don't you think we'll get in trouble with the Administration if we poke around too much?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
This feels like one of those mystery adventures
8v. But don't you think we'll get in trouble with the Administration if we poke around too much?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Considering we're already using Eternium as fuel without authorization, we're past the point of worrying about their approval.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Considering we're already using Eternium as fuel without authorization, we're past the point of worrying about their approval.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Considering we're already using Eternium as fuel without authorization, we're past the point of worrying about their approval.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fair point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fair point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fair point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess we're already in too deep, huh? Might as well go all in. Master! Let's strip those lights too. They'd look great in our home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess we're already in too deep, huh? Might as well go all in. Master! Let's strip those lights too. They'd look great in our home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess we're already in too deep, huh? Might as well go all in. Master! Let's strip those lights too. They'd look great in our home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The energy leads here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The energy leads here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The energy leads here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, this doesn't look like some secret passage. We're back outside again!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, this doesn't look like some secret passage. We're back outside again!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, this doesn't look like some secret passage. We're back outside again!

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vSeems like this is it.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vSeems like this is it.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vSeems like this is it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ship's power was being funneled beneath this spot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ship's power was being funneled beneath this spot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ship's power was being funneled beneath this spot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't look like something the Administration made. Doesn't even seem all that advanced, tech-wise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't look like something the Administration made. Doesn't even seem all that advanced, tech-wise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't look like something the Administration made. Doesn't even seem all that advanced, tech-wise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. Just looks like an ordinary well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. Just looks like an ordinary well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. Just looks like an ordinary well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And yet, even with all that energy from the ship, it's barely functional.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And yet, even with all that energy from the ship, it's barely functional.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet, even with all that energy from the ship, it's barely functional.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Ah
8v! I remember now!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Ah
8v! I remember now!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Ah
8v! I remember now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was something just like this near where we met Yeonhwa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was something just like this near where we met Yeonhwa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was something just like this near where we met Yeonhwa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though it was in better shape back then, with no moss and all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though it was in better shape back then, with no moss and all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though it was in better shape back then, with no moss and all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, Andy, you mentioned something like that before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, Andy, you mentioned something like that before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, Andy, you mentioned something like that before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How the device Yeonhwa used was likely another access point like our <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How the device Yeonhwa used was likely another access point like our <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How the device Yeonhwa used was likely another access point like our <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Then does that mean
8v?!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Then does that mean
8v?!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Then does that mean
8v?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're at the same place where we met Yeonhwa?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're at the same place where we met Yeonhwa?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're at the same place where we met Yeonhwa?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this well was made for the same purpose as the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color>, then the mechanics should be the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this well was made for the same purpose as the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color>, then the mechanics should be the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this well was made for the same purpose as the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color>, then the mechanics should be the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not seriously thinking of activating it, are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not seriously thinking of activating it, are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not seriously thinking of activating it, are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't just sit around waiting for the next Ink Rain to fall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't just sit around waiting for the next Ink Rain to fall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't just sit around waiting for the next Ink Rain to fall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Time to bring back the rest of the Eternium from the lab.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Time to bring back the rest of the Eternium from the lab.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Time to bring back the rest of the Eternium from the lab.
